title: Add new types for conversation learning, ambient memory, and learning feedback

context_files.reason: Current types.ts structure and LearningEntry types to extend

acceptance_criteria: New types (ConversationMemory, ConfidenceScore, AmbientMemory, SlangDetection, SuggestedLearning, LearningFeedback) are added to types.ts
No existing types, interfaces, or exports are removed or broken
LearningStore interface is extended with new optional methods (suggestMemory, autoCapture, acceptAmbientEntry)
TypeScript compiles without errors for types.ts (npm exec tsc -- --noEmit src/lib/interpreter/types.ts)
All existing tests importing types.ts still pass
